text: Standing in this space, I am struck by a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass wall with its reflective surface makes me feel both inside and outside, separated but drawn in by the colors and lights beyond. Inside, the bold 'R+D' on the vibrant wall and the interplay of text, screens, and glowing displays hint at innovation and exploration. I am aware of my own threshold between observation and participation, suspended in a place dedicated to pondering and pushing the boundaries of knowledge. The careful design and illumination instill a quiet energy and make me feel as though I am at the frontier of ideas, yet also grounded and contemplative in the silence surrounding me.
